ground_truth.title: Compare and Find Your Perfect Android Phone | Android
ground_truth.main_content: Let me find your perfect phone. This interactive guide helps you discover the ideal Android phone based on your preferences through a 5-step questionnaire. The questions cover your priorities (watching videos, taking photos, performance, multitasking), budget range (up to $449, $450-$999, $1000+), screen size preferences, desired features (battery life, memory, storage capacity, waterproof), and camera quality (up to 16 MP, 16.1-49.9 MP, 50 MP+). Based on your answers, the system provides personalized phone recommendations matching your criteria with options from various carriers.
with: Let me find your perfect phone.
How much do you want to pay?
Got it. What screen size are you after?
